entries.title: Air Current Microsensor
entries.description: PSY. You suffer no navigation or combat penalties from blindness or darkness.

entries.title: Alluring Fakeface
entries.description: EGO. You are extraordinarily beautiful. EGO save to enthrall a Biological creature. They will never harm you.

entries.title: Autoglot HeadBank
entries.description: INT. +2 to INT. You understand all languages.

entries.title: Backup Heart
entries.description: CON. +2 to CON. +5 max HP.

entries.title: Carbide Knucklebones
entries.description: STR. Your bare fists deal 2d4 damage.

entries.title: Cyberliver
entries.description: CON. You gain immunity to all poisons. You cannot get drunk.

entries.title: Dazzleskin Filaments
entries.description: CON. You are immune to laser beams and energy weapons. DIS when hiding.

entries.title: Dopamine Synthesizer
entries.description: EGO. +2 to EGO. You are immune to fear, panic, and embarrassment.

entries.title: Dorsal Jump-pack
entries.description: DEX. You have hover-jets mounted on your back. You fly slowly and loudly.

entries.title: Ferrosteel Exo-Skeleton
entries.description: STR. Add +2 to AV and STR. Subtract -4 DEX. You cannot swim.

entries.title: Finger Syringe
entries.description: DEX. One finger is a hidden injector. You can load it with any elixir or poison.

entries.title: Hydraulic Biceps
entries.description: STR. Add STR bonus to melee weapon damage.

entries.title: Hyper-elastic Tendons
entries.description: DEX. +2 to DEX. You can jump across huge distances like a frog.

entries.title: Merciless Cybereyes
entries.description: DEX. Add DEX bonus to ranged weapon damage.

entries.title: Mercurial Fakeface
entries.description: EGO. Your face can alter its features and colour at will.

entries.title: Subdermal Ceramic Plating
entries.description: CON. +2 to base AV. Cannot be removed.

entries.title: Subdermal Insulation
entries.description: CON. Immunity to damage from flames, cold, and electricity. Cannot be removed.

entries.title: Tactical Bioscanner
entries.description: PSY. You know the Level, AV, and current HP of any Biological or Fungal creature.

entries.title: Tactical Technoscanner
entries.description: INT. You know the Level, AV, and current HP of any Synthetic creature.

entries.title: Trauma-Response Rig
entries.description: CON. Negate the effects of a Wound. Can be activated once per day.
